MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-16-2005 IN 206, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 10/31/05 IS CONTINUED TO 3/6/06 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT.
